rows.description: June 22. Pd Subscription money for History of Barbados viz. Hugheses in sundry Cohorn Room. Examined with T.S.
rows.notes: Amounts agree. gemini-flash's description is significantly more accurate, capturing the full text including interlinear details. gpt-5-mini misread 'Barbados' as 'Berks' and 'Hugheses' as 'Sturges' and missed the interlinear text entirely. My confidence is high based on clear image.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a subscription for the History of Barbados for the Hughes (Cohorn Room), amounting to £1 3s 0d.
